justification: The question concerns the option-adjusted spread (OAS) of corporate bonds, which is a key metric for pricing and performance in fixed-income financial markets.
question: Will the option-adjusted spread of securities with an investment grade rating of A in the ICE BofA US Corporate Index, which tracks the performance of corporate debt issued in the US domestic market, have increased by 2026-04-05 as compared to its value on 2026-03-29?
